$comment: GENERATED - DO NOT EDIT. Source: survey-types.jsonld

externalCodeList.ddiEmission: concept[@vocab='<vocab>'] in place of inline catgry; catgry MUST NOT be emitted
externalCodeList.structuralNote: select_multiple_from_file emits a flat <var> with concept/@vocab, NOT a varGrp[@type='multipleResp'] with binary children. This differs from select_multiple.

fields.ddiPath: codeBook/@version (DDI version, not survey version — record survey version elsewhere)

magicNames.note: Body text from label promoted to survey-level intro. Convention only; opt-in via tool config.

xlsformLanguageList.fallback: first language encountered in label columns
xlsformLanguageList.note: Each language code SHOULD be a valid IETF BCP 47 tag (e.g. 'de', 'en', 'fr-BE'). Tools may warn on non-BCP47 codes.

lsTsvHandling.emission: one row per language per question — same name/type, different language column + text/help cells
lsTsvHandling.baseLanguage: first emitted; subsequent languages reference same question name

ddiHandling.emission: one child element per language with xml:lang attr

containerAttrs.name: <question name>
containerAttrs.var: space-separated IDs of member binary vars

ddi.memberVars: one <var> per choice, name=<qname>_<choicecode>, intrvl='discrete', responseDomainType='multiple', binary catgry codes 0/1
ddi.otherVariant: if `or_other` flag present: parent varGrp[@type='other'] wraps the multipleResp group + a sibling _other text var; see convention:other

composites.label: Grid / Matrix Group

trigger.xlsformPattern: begin_group row with appearance=table-list (or name contains 'grid', or label contains 'matrix')
trigger.applyTo: begin_group + all rows until matching end_group

rows.match: type=select_one <listname> — all items MUST share the same listname

ddi.memberVars: one <var> per item row. Each var carries the full <catgry> set repeated (responseDomainType='category').

lsTsv.headerRow: F-type question (matrix header) with answerClass=A; answer codes from shared list
lsTsv.note: LS represents the matrix as a single question with sub-questions; categories not re-emitted per row

notes: If `appearance=table-list` is absent, the group is flattened — children become top-level vars in DDI, group is lost.
Items SHOULD share the same `listname` so the matrix is rectangular.

composites.label: Semi-open `or_other` pattern (companion text var)

trigger.xlsformPattern: select_one|select_multiple row with `or_other` flag in type cell, immediately followed (or anywhere later in same scope) by a text row named `<basename>_other`
trigger.applyTo: the base row + the `<basename>_other` companion row

containerAttrs.name: <basename>
containerAttrs.var: for single-choice: '<base_var_ID> <other_var_ID>'. For multiple-choice: var=<other_var_ID>, varGrp=<base_multipleResp_groupID>

ddi.childStructure: single-choice: parent varGrp + base <var> + _other text <var>. multiple-choice: parent varGrp + child multipleResp varGrp (named <basename>_choices) + _other text <var> as SIBLING (NOT inside multipleResp's @var list)

notes: Choice with code 'other' MUST exist in the base question's list.
For multiple_choice_other: the _other text var must NOT appear in the multipleResp group's @var attribute.
DDI→XLSForm direction reconstructs relevance from the parent varGrp[@type='other'] reference.
